name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `python main.py`
2. Enter project description: "..."
3. At the approval step, type "..."
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message if there is one.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.12]
- Azure model deployment: [e.g., GPT-4o]

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help (screenshots, logs, etc.)
